extortion.description: About us Högtryckscenter has been operating since 1984. Our head office is located in Gothenburg. We have three agencies in Sweden.  Goupil electric work vehicles, we have a careful selection of accredited partners throughout Sweden. Our customers are municipalities, housing companies, the Swedish church, private actors and industry. Dynajet high-pressure washers, sales are handled through a careful selection of dealers in Sweden. Customers are in the sanitation industry, municipalities and industry. Glutton electric square / street vacuum cleaner. High pressure centers build and design car washes for all types of vehicles. Fully customized to meet tomorrow's requirements for efficiency and environmental requirements.  Furthermore, we present the market's widest range of cleaning machines, high-pressure washers, industrial vacuum cleaners, cleaning tools and chemicals.  Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
